SELECT json.number(data) AS number_value FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.number(data) AS number_value FROM test_json WHERE json.number(data) IS NOT NULL AND json.number(data) > 0;
SELECT json.number(data) FROM test_json WHERE json.number(data) IN (SELECT json.number(data) FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id INT, nested_data JSON);
INSERT INTO test_nested VALUES (1, json '{"n": 8}'), (2, json '{"n": 2.718}');
SELECT json.number(nested_data) AS nested_number FROM test_nested WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_nested WHERE json.number(nested_data) < 3);

SELECT a.id, json.number(a.nested_data) AS nested_num, json.number(b.data) AS json_num FROM test_nested a JOIN test_json b ON json.number(a.nested_data) = json.number(b.data) WHERE json.number(a.nested_data) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT json.number(data) AS number_value FROM (SELECT data FROM test_json WHERE data IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE json.number(data) < 5;
SELECT json.number(data) FROM test_json WHERE json.number(data) IS NULL UNION SELECT NULL;
